description_long: This is a hardcover book with a striking cover design, featuring a bold red spine and a marbled pattern in shades of brown, black, and white with occasional purple accents on the front and back. The book appears to be of medium thickness, with visible, slightly yellowed pages indicating some age or vintage quality. The spine is solid red and vertically embossed with gold text, giving it a classic, elegant appearance. The marbled pattern on the covers is organic and abstract, with no discernible imagery or illustration. The edges of the book are straight and well-defined, and the corners are slightly rounded, suggesting it has been handled but remains in good condition. The overall look is that of a traditional, possibly collectible, literary volume.
description: A hardcover book with a red spine and marbled brown, black, and white covers, featuring gold text on the spine and slightly aged pages. The design is classic and elegant, with no visible illustration.
description_view_0: Front cover view showing the marbled pattern with brown, black, white, and purple tones alongside a solid red spine.
description_view_1: Top-down view displaying the thickness of the book and the yellowed, tightly packed pages.
description_view_2: Back cover view with a similar marbled pattern and a red section on the opposite side from the front.
description_view_3: Spine view highlighting the solid red color and vertically embossed gold text.
attribute_spine_design: The spine is solid red with vertically oriented gold embossed text. There are no additional decorative elements or patterns.
